title: Total Cost of AI Ownership | Cohere
author: @cohere
text: Total cost of AI ownershipWhat is your AI strategy actually costing you?Model the full economics of your AI stack — infrastructure, inference, and scale.Contact usTrusted by industry leaders and developers worldwideLower your overall AI spend with Cohere's full‑stack agentic platformOwn your AI at every stage of the value chain.Exceptional cost‑per‑token efficiencyCohere leads in model efficiency against similar‑sized models.Fewer tokens neededAdvanced architecture routes generation through only active parameters.Process more, with fewer tokensModels like Command A+ offer 256k context length — twice most competitors — to minimize costly document chunking.Align AI infrastructure with your bottom lineCohere provides a full-stack AI solution, priced, and run on your terms — with flexible deployment strategies.Run the model where your data already lives — priced by infrastructure you provision.Identity and audits on your terms — no premium for governance bolted on after the fact.Coordinate multi‑step reasoning, tool calls, and handoffs in one place.Send each request to the right-priced model — first-party, open-weights, or your own.Provisioning, scaling, and data flows owned as a system.Your data and the compute under it, in your preferred deployment environment.Capitalize on AI sovereignty with a lower overall cost of ownershipCohere protects you from vendor lock‑in, so you can stay flexible — while staying ahead of costs.Protect your IPMaintain ownership of your proprietary data while leveraging enterprise‑grade models with North.Own your AIInsulate your enterprise from shifting AI governance policies.Future‑proof cost forecastsEliminate unpredictable per‑token API costs and gain predictable infrastructure expenses that improve margins over time.Stay agileAdapt to evolving regulatory landscapes and business requirements without being constrained by vendors.AI on your termsRun our AI anywhere with deployment options tailored to your unique infrastructure, security, and performance needs.Private: Run our models on-premises or within an isolated virtual private cloud (VPC) environmentModel Vault: Deploy through Model Vault for a dedicated, fully managed SaaS inference platformPublic / Hybrid cloud: Integrate private infrastructure with public cloud resourcesSaaS: Deploy through our fully managed SaaS platform to scale securely without the cost and complexity of managing your own infrastructureMore about Deployment OptionsTake ownership of your AI economics with CohereConnect with an expert to see how a full-stack, on-your-terms platform lowers your total cost of ownership.Align infrastructure spend to your actual usage, not vendor pricingChoose deployment options that fit your data and security requirementsMove from unpredictable API costs to forecastable margins
